title: oberonia reilloi
intro: Oberonia reilloi, also known as the Reillo's orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to the Philippines. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its rhizome, which contains a compound called iridoid glycoside, that has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Oberonia reilloi include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory problems due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. In traditional medicine, the rhizome of the plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
